name: ad-intel
description: Ad performance monitor for Spend vs CTR anomaly detection using ltr bridge inputs.
capability_summary: Monitors ad performance using ltr bridge inputs, flags spend/CTR anomalies, and outputs deterministic JSON alerts for the marketing strategist.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Optional local JSON file with campaign records

parameters.name: bridge_command
parameters.description: Optional ltr bridge shell command that returns JSON records.
